 {"id":"bd-thgk","title":"Improve test coverage for internal/compact (18.2% → 70%)","description":"Improve test coverage for internal/compact package from 17% to 70%.

## Current State
- Coverage: 17.3%
- Files: compactor.go, git.go, haiku.go
- Tests: compactor_test.go (minimal tests)

## Functions Needing Tests

### compactor.go (core compaction)
- [ ] New - needs config validation tests
- [ ] CompactTier1 - needs single issue compaction tests
- [ ] CompactTier1Batch - needs batch processing tests
- [ ] compactSingleWithResult - internal, test via public API

### git.go
- [ ] GetCurrentCommitHash - needs git repo fixture tests

### haiku.go (AI summarization) - MOCK REQUIRED
- [ ] NewHaikuClient - needs API key validation tests
- [ ] SummarizeTier1 - needs mock API response tests
- [ ] callWithRetry - needs retry logic tests
- [ ] isRetryable - needs error classification tests
- [ ] renderTier1Prompt - needs template rendering tests

## Implementation Guide

1. **Mock the Anthropic API:**
   ```go
   // Create mock HTTP server
   server := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
       json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]interface{}{
           "content": []map[string]string{{"text": "Summarized content"}},
       })
   }))
   defer server.Close()
   
   // Point client at mock
   client.baseURL = server.URL
   ```

2. **Test scenarios:**
   - Successful compaction with AI summary
   - API failure with retry
   - Rate limit handling
   - Empty issue handling
   - Large issue truncation

3. **Use test database:**
   ```go
   store, cleanup := testutil.NewTestStore(t)
   defer cleanup()
   ```

## Success Criteria
- Coverage ≥ 70%
- AI calls properly mocked (no real API calls in tests)
- Retry logic verified
- Error paths covered

## Run Tests
```bash
go test -v -cover ./internal/compact
go test -race ./internal/compact

 {"id":"bd-tksk","title":"Support session_id field on issue close/update mutations","description":"## Context

Per Gas Town decision 009-session-events-architecture.md, work attribution for
entity CV building requires capturing which Claude Code session performed work.

## Implementation

Add session_id support to issue mutations:

### Schema
Add optional field to issue close:
- closed_by_session: string (Claude Code session UUID)

### CLI
```bash
bd close gt-abc --session "abc123-session-id"
# Or via env var:
CLAUDE_SESSION_ID=abc123 bd close gt-abc
```

### Storage
Store in issues.jsonl:
```json
{"id": "gt-abc", "status": "closed", "closed_by_session": "abc123", ...}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bd close accepts --session flag or reads CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env
- [ ] session_id stored in issue close record
- [ ] bd show displays closed_by_session if present
- [ ] Works for bd update --status=closed as well

## Future

- Query by session: bd list --closed-by-session=X
- Entity chain: aggregate session activity for CV

## Related

- Gas Town docs/hop/decisions/009-session-events-architecture.md
- gt-nvz8b: gt done captures session_id","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"beads/crew/dave","created_at":"2025-12-31T12:49:58.379182-08:00","created_by":"gastown/crew/joe","updated_at":"2025-12-31T13:13:17.590098-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T13:13:17.590098-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented session_id tracking for issue close/update mutations"}
 {"id":"bd-tm2p","title":"Polecats get stuck on interactive shell prompts (cp/mv/rm -i)","description":"During swarm operations, polecats frequently get stuck waiting for interactive prompts from shell commands like:
- cp prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'
- mv prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'  
- rm prompting 'remove file?'

This happens because macOS aliases or shell configs may have -i flags set by default.

Root cause: Claude Code runs commands that trigger interactive confirmation prompts, but cannot respond to them, causing the agent to hang indefinitely.

Observed in: Multiple polecats during GH issues swarm (Dec 2024)
- Derrick, Roustabout, Prospector, Warboy all got stuck on y/n prompts

Suggested fixes:
1. AGENTS.md should instruct agents to always use -f flag with cp/mv/rm
2. Polecat startup could set shell aliases to use non-interactive versions
3. bd prime hook could include guidance about non-interactive commands
4. Consider detecting stuck prompts and auto-recovering","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-14T16:51:24.572271-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"bug"}
